### CostLens — Know what AI will cost before your invoice does

1

Hey Product Hunt [...] Multichannel Support: Works across website chat widgets, WhatsApp, voice calls and CRM integrations — helping teams answer questions and qualify leads automatically.

Smart Integrations: Integrates with CRM tools, telephony systems, Slack, WhatsApp, Zoom, Shopify, etc., so interactions update your systems automatically.

Business Growth Focus: Great for small teams and growing companies that want to lose fewer leads and save support hours while boosting customer satisfaction.

#### vs Alternatives

Before choosing Kipps AI, I looked at platforms like:

Retell AI (focuses mostly on voice only)

Other generic chatbot builders — but many lacked deep multichannel automation without heavy development. [...] Kipps AI

### Top forum threads [...] ## The email client Product Hunt actually uses

Newsletter Sponsor

Most of us here switched to Superhuman and stopped losing mornings to inbox. AI writes replies, summarizes threads, and triages in seconds. Email and calendar in oneplace, so you're not piecing together context from four different apps.

Fast in a way that actually shows up in your day.

## Stop re-explaining your tools to every new agent

UseAgents is a real-time registry for tools and APIs. Developers define a tool once, and agents can discover and use it without scraping docs, guessing what exists, or relying on stale model knowledge. [...] 🔥 Our Take: Mobile builders have made it much easier to make an app. They have not made it much easier to launch one properly. The bottleneck just moved downstream into store copy, screenshot sets, pricing by market, and all the other stuff that decides whether your app looks legit or half-finished. That is the gap Forvibe is going after.
